content:
What should I pursue after graduation? Which skills should I learn? Which certifications are actually relevant? And where do I even begin?

These questions are common not only among students but also among professionals trying to grow, upskill, or transition into new career paths.

Today, learning opportunities are everywhere. There are thousands of online courses, certifications, career roadmaps, job roles, and emerging technologies to explore. Yet having access to more information does not always make career decisions easier. In many cases, it creates even more confusion.

A student may know that artificial intelligence, cloud computing, data analytics, cybersecurity, or product management are growing fields—but may not know which path aligns with their interests and abilities. Similarly, a working professional may want to upskill but struggle to understand which certification would genuinely support their career goals.

The challenge is often not a lack of talent or ambition.

It is a lack of personalized direction.

This challenge inspired me to build Supernova AI, an AI-powered Career Decision Intelligence Platform developed as my capstone project during the Google Cloud Gen AI Academy APAC 2026.

The Story Behind Supernova AI

Growing up, I had limited exposure to the wide range of career opportunities that existed beyond conventional paths. Like many students, career decisions were often shaped by what was familiar, socially accepted, or commonly recommended rather than by a deeper understanding of individual interests, strengths, and aspirations.

Over time, I realized that this experience was not unique.

Many students—particularly those from smaller cities and underserved communities—may have the ability and ambition to succeed but lack access to personalized career guidance. They may not know about emerging roles, the skills those roles require, the certifications that can support their growth, or the practical steps needed to move from interest to opportunity.

This led me to ask:

What if career guidance could begin with the individual rather than a generic list of popular careers?

That question became the foundation of Supernova AI.

What Is Supernova AI?

Supernova AI is an AI-powered career guidance platform designed to help students and young professionals make more informed and confident career decisions.

Instead of relying only on static questionnaires or offering the same recommendations to every user, the platform considers an individual’s:

• Educational background

• Interests

• Existing skills

• Career aspirations

• Preferred areas of growth

Using this information, Supernova AI generates a personalized AI Career Report that provides not only a career recommendation but also actionable guidance to help the user move forward.

The report includes:

• A personalized Career Match Score

• A recommended career path

• An explanation of why the career aligns with the user’s profile

• Skills the user should develop

• A structured learning roadmap

• Relevant certification suggestions

The goal is not to let AI make career decisions on behalf of people. Instead, Supernova AI acts as a decision-support system—helping users discover possibilities, understand their options, identify skill gaps, and take informed next steps.

Demo: https://youtu.be/-UWCe7B7waE?si=GGAwWbFWtz3kg5tT

How Supernova AI Works

The platform follows a simple and accessible workflow.

First, the user enters information about their education, interests, skills, and career goals through a profile form.

The frontend securely sends this information to an Express.js backend, which communicates with Google’s Gemini 2.5 Flash model. Gemini analyzes the user’s profile and generates contextual career recommendations.

The structured response is then displayed as a personalized AI Career Report within seconds.

The complete workflow is:

User Profile → Secure Backend Processing → Gemini 2.5 Flash Analysis → Personalized Career Report → Actionable Career Roadmap

This transforms basic user information into practical career intelligence that can help users understand not only what they could pursue, but also why the path may suit them and how they can begin preparing for it.

Why Google Gemini 2.5 Flash?

For Supernova AI, I wanted an AI model capable of understanding multiple aspects of a user’s profile together rather than evaluating each input independently.

A person’s career direction cannot be determined by one skill, one academic qualification, or one interest. Meaningful guidance requires context.

Google’s Gemini 2.5 Flash enables the platform to analyze the relationship between a user’s education, interests, skills, and aspirations and generate a structured, personalized response in real time.

The solution was developed using:

•
HTML5 for the frontend structure

•
CSS3 for a clean and responsive interface

•
JavaScript for client-side interactions, API requests, and dynamic content rendering

•
Node.js as the backend runtime

•
Express.js for REST API communication

•
Google Gemini 2.5 Flash API for career analysis, recommendations, skill guidance, learning roadmaps, and certification suggestions

The architecture was intentionally designed to be lightweight, accessible, and cost-effective while providing a scalable foundation for future deployment through Google Cloud Run and integration with additional cloud services.

What Makes Supernova AI Different?

Many conventional career platforms rely on fixed questionnaires, predefined career categories, or generic recommendations.

Supernova AI focuses on contextual personalization.

It does not simply suggest a career title. It aims to answer the questions that often come immediately afterward:

Why could this career be suitable for me?

Which skills am I currently missing?

What should I learn first?

Which certifications could support my development?

What practical steps can I take to move toward this career?

By bringing these insights together in one personalized report, Supernova AI helps turn career exploration into an actionable learning journey.

Its key features include:

• AI-powered career recommendations

• Personalized Career Match Scores

• Contextual explanations for recommended career paths

• Skill-development recommendations

• Individual learning roadmaps

• Industry-relevant certification suggestions

• Fast and interactive career guidance

• A clean and accessible web experience

• A scalable Node.js and Express.js backend

Building for Accessibility and Equal Opportunity

One of the core motivations behind Supernova AI is the belief that access to career guidance should not depend entirely on a student’s location, background, institution, or professional network.

Students from smaller cities and underserved communities may have fewer opportunities to interact with career counsellors, industry professionals, or mentors working in emerging fields. This can influence the careers they consider—not because they lack potential, but because they may not have enough exposure to available opportunities.

Supernova AI aims to help bridge this awareness gap by making personalized guidance more accessible.

The platform is not intended to replace teachers, mentors, career counsellors, or human judgment. Instead, it can complement them by helping users begin with greater clarity, ask more informed questions, and better understand the skills and learning opportunities relevant to their goals.

From Learning About Gen AI to Building with It

Developing Supernova AI taught me that building with generative AI involves much more than connecting an application to a model.

It begins with understanding a real problem.

It requires thinking about the user, identifying what information is genuinely useful, designing meaningful prompts, structuring AI-generated outputs, and ensuring that recommendations are clear and actionable.

Through this project, I had the opportunity to move beyond learning about generative AI and apply it to a challenge that has personally resonated with me.

The experience also strengthened my understanding of how AI can be used not merely to generate information, but to support better decisions.

Looking Ahead

Supernova AI currently provides a functional foundation for personalized AI-powered career guidance, with opportunities for further development.

Future enhancements could include:

• Resume-based skill analysis

• Personalized skill-gap assessments

• Dynamic learning pathways

• Career progress tracking

• Integration with verified learning and certification platforms

• Labour-market and emerging-job insights

• Mentor and career-counsellor collaboration

• Multilingual career guidance

• Accessibility-focused features

• Integration with career and industry datasets through Google Cloud services

These capabilities could make career guidance more inclusive, adaptive, and responsive to changing industry needs.

Every Career Journey Deserves a Clearer Starting Point

Supernova AI began with a simple observation: many people are willing to learn and grow but are uncertain about where to begin.

Students may have talent but limited exposure.

Professionals may have experience but lack clarity about their next step.

Learners may have access to hundreds of certifications but not know which ones align with their goals.

Supernova AI aims to bring these disconnected questions together and transform them into personalized, actionable guidance.

For me, Supernova AI is more than a career recommendation platform. It represents the possibility of using generative AI to make career exploration more personalized, accessible, and inclusive—helping learners move from uncertainty to informed action, one meaningful step at a time.
